newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Palfinger continues routine APAC offshore-wind crane deliveries (e.g., Korea CTV) but reported no new earnings, guidance, contract, or M&A; next earnings are scheduled for July 28, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent AI-node lens: lifting/handling tie to robotics/datacenter-infra logistics stays indirect and speculative. No new contract, guidance or analyst catalyst since June 9; -1.7% drift is noise. Hold at 77 ahead of July 28 earnings.
verdicts.bull: Crane/handling systems offer optionality on maintenance robotics and modular datacenter/industrial logistics buildout.
verdicts.neutral: Quiet stretch with no AI-specific datapoints; back in ATX, awaiting July 28 H1 print.
verdicts.bear: Core lifting cyclical with only tenuous AI linkage; -3.6% YTD and weak macro cap the latent-node thesis.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Industrial-cycle softness; AI linkage too indirect to sustain rank
